_provenance.warning: DEV FIXTURE ONLY — every feature in this file is hand-drawn and the edge_id values are PLACEHOLDERS. They are NOT real SUMO edge ids and will NOT match any kernel Trajectory.edge_counts. The real edges layer must be exported from the Iloilo SUMO net (app/packages/kernel/data/iloilo.net.xml, built by app/packages/data/build_network.py — gitignored, not in this repo), with one LineString per edge carrying its true SUMO id in properties.edge_id.
_provenance.purpose: Illustrates the congestion-choropleth data contract (see public/layers/README.md) and lets the layer render something in dev before the real export exists.
